input.knowledge_yaml_content:
id: pappers
display_name: "Pappers"
homepage: https://pappers.fr
key_acquisition_url: https://www.pappers.fr/api/dashboard
integration_kind: rest
env_vars:
  - name: PAPPERS_API_KEY
    description: "Get from your Pappers dashboard"
    example: "demo-xxxxxxxx"
    required: true
capabilities_supported:
  - id: icp-company-search
    adapter_module: src/lib/providers/adapters/icp-company-search-pappers.ts
install_steps:
  - "Sign up at $homepage if you don't have an account."
  - "Get your API key from $key_acquisition_url"
  - "Run: yalc-gtm connect-provider $id"
test_query:
  capability: icp-company-search
  input:
    segments: "SaaS startups in Europe"
    max_results: 1

expected_output.next_action: Open ~/.gtm-os/.env and set PAPPERS_API_KEY, then run `yalc-gtm connect-provider pappers` again to finish wiring.
